description: Foundational Beltrami equilibria, non-Hermitian flow operators, and spectral solvers provide the substrate on which the Atlas argument is built.

open_questions.question: Which foundation pieces need direct validation before they can support the Atlas construction?

suggested_next_steps.description: Map the Chandrasekhar-Kendall, Mahajan-Yoshida, Hameiri, and Frieman operator assumptions onto the exact Atlas H1-H5 requirements.
suggested_next_steps.title: Foundation-to-H1-H5 map

suggested_next_steps.description: Run the Atlas equilibrium through a Legolas-style or shooting-method benchmark and compare eigenvalues against the seeded pseudospectral result.
suggested_next_steps.title: Independent spectral benchmark

suggested_next_steps.description: Verify each foundation source is being used at its native scope instead of being promoted into direct experimental evidence.
suggested_next_steps.title: Foundational source audit

scope.regime: Foundational Beltrami equilibria, non-Hermitian flow operators, and spectral solvers provide the substrate on which the Atlas argument is built.

title: Beltrami, operator, and numerical foundations support the Atlas construction
